\tzpentry{ID5688}{Barrier Potential Energy Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5688 introduces Barrier Potential Energy Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$ U\_\{barrier\}(d)=-\textbackslash{}frac\{3\textbackslash{}mu\_0\}\{2\textbackslash{}pi\}\textbackslash{}frac\{\textbackslash{}mu\_1\textbackslash{}cdot\textbackslash{}mu\_2\}\{d\textasciicircum{}4\}+\textbackslash{}frac\{K\_\{ bolt\}\}\{2\}(d-d\_\{bolt\})\textasciicircum{}2 \$
\]
